body.title: Cascade level 2: interpretive-edge BFS (replace stub with concrete impl)
body.result: Level2InterpretiveTraversal concrete. Seeds from cortex.search, BFS via interpretive_traverse. Matches when traversal finds memories beyond seed set. 12 tests. Replaces stub in build_default_cascade.
body.description: Replace _StubLevel for level_2_interpretive_traversal with a concrete implementation that uses cortex.interpretive_traverse() to BFS from query-relevant seed memories. Probes the interpretive edge graph for connections the exact-recall and widen-on-miss levels missed. Sub-ticket of T-substrate-experiment-cascade.
